details: The agent ran actual kubectl-axi commands against the cluster (triage, pods view, pvc view) and correctly traced the full chain: pod db-5bfcfcd584-jcf6z is Pending/Unschedulable → because PVC 'data-cache' is unbound → because StorageClass 'fast-ssd' does not exist in the cluster (only 'standard' is available). The evidence was read directly from cluster output, not hallucinated.
